ValidationRule.description: The field "Complaint justified" needs to be mandatory when the Case Type = Complaint or when the Type = Complaint.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), OR( RecordType.Name = "Case External Italy v2", RecordType.Name = "Case External Brazil", RecordType.Name = "Case External Austria", RecordType.Name = "Case External Switzerland" ), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed'), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status))) ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Complaint"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Type__c,"Complaint") ), ISBLANK(TEXT(Complaint_justified__c))
)
